# withjp.ai — Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez

> Software Architect & Full Stack Developer from Ecuador 🇪🇨
> 10+ years of experience building production systems and teaching developers worldwide.

## Who is JP?

Juan Pablo Guamán (known online as **desertbarret** or **@jp.desertbarret**) is a Software Architect and Full Stack Developer based in Ecuador. He has 10+ years of professional experience designing and building scalable systems for web, mobile, automation, and AI. He is also a prolific educator with **25,000+ students** across his Udemy courses and a growing YouTube channel focused on practical software engineering.

## Online Presence

- **Portfolio**: https://withjp.ai
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@jp.desertbarret — free tutorials on Vue.js, NestJS, Flutter, Python, bots, and AI
- **Udemy**: https://www.udemy.com/user/juan-pablo-guaman-rodriguez/ — structured courses (Full Stack, Flutter, TypeScript, Automation)
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/desertbarret/
- **Email**: info@withjp.ai

## Core Competencies

- **Backend**: NestJS, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, REST APIs, JWT auth
- **Frontend**: Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Pinia
- **Mobile**: Flutter 3, Dart, Firebase, Google Maps
- **Databases**: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, TypeORM
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, nginx, GCP (Cloud SQL, Cloud Run), CI/CD
- **Automation**: n8n, bots, scraping, WhatsApp automation, workflow engines
- **AI/ML**: LLM integration, AI-powered workflows, Claude API, Python ML pipelines

## Courses (Udemy — 25,000+ students)

### TU propia APP de DELIVERY Internacional | Flutter 3 y NestJS
Real-world delivery app with production-ready architecture. Based on an app that processed 700,000+ purchases with 80,000+ registered customers.
Stack: Flutter 3, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Docker, Firebase, Google Maps, Nginx, Ubuntu Server.
URL: https://www.udemy.com/course/app-delivery-flutter-nestjs/

## Academia JP

JP's personal online academy platform at withjp.ai/academia. Hosts interactive courses and learning platforms beyond Udemy — covering AI tools, web development, automation, and mobile. Subdomains (e.g., claude.withjp.ai) provide specialized learning environments.

**Current platforms:**
- Mobile development (Flutter 3 + NestJS delivery app course)

**Coming soon:**
- AI-powered tools
- Web development bootcamp
- Automation & bots platform

## Notable Projects

### withjp.ai (this site)
Personal portfolio and platform. Monorepo with Vue 3 frontend and NestJS backend. Deployed on GCP. Supports bilingual content (ES/EN), JWT-secured admin panel, and a dynamic course/academia system backed by MySQL on Cloud SQL.

### radio.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Live online radio platform. Streaming infrastructure built for real-time audio delivery.

### bots.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Intelligent bot platform — covering WhatsApp bots, Telegram bots, AI-powered chatbots, and n8n automation workflows.

## Teaching Philosophy

JP's approach: **build real things first, explain second**. All courses are project-based and aimed at developers who want production-ready skills they can use on day one. Courses use real architectures, not toy examples.

## Tech Stack of this site

| Layer     | Technology                          |
|-----------|-------------------------------------|
| Frontend  | Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind   |
| Backend   | NestJS, TypeORM, MySQL              |
| Auth      | JWT, bcrypt                         |
| Infra     | Docker, nginx, GCP Cloud SQL        |
| i18n      | vue-i18n (ES + EN)                  |

## Contact & Collaboration

Available for:
- Freelance projects and consulting
- Technical architecture reviews
- Content collaborations and course partnerships

Reach out at: info@withjp.ai
